abstract: Matt Schumpert - Director, Product Management, Datameer This session will demonstrate the advancements in Datameer 5.0 with Smart ExecutionTM and its ability to optimize performance and cluster utilization across a variety of Hadoop workloads. Learn how we can do this on both small and large data by dynamically selecting the optimal compute framework at every step and performing in-memory processing, resulting in dramatic performance improvements and enhanced end-user productivity to get more out of your Hadoop investment by improving productivity, hardware utilization, and your ability to support near-real-time analytics use cases on a single, cost-effective platform

speakers.name: Matt Schumpert
speakers.title: Director, Product Management, Datameer This session will demonstrate the advancements in Datameer 5.0

title: Understanding Datameer 5.0 with Smart Execution
